incentive.statement: Make the Source, Authority, and Result surfaces answerable at a glance while preserving typed Andrews authority and the existing page 46-47 formula structures.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate presentation hierarchy, stable typed control ownership, tests, and browser proof without moving grammar construction into the renderer.

outcome: Source is compact, Authority is derivation-first with progressive clause and sentence settings, and Result is answer-first while Linear and Diagram retain Andrews page 46-47 structure.

responsibilities.statement: Own surface order, disclosure, and visual hierarchy without constructing grammar.

actors.contribution: Implement compact Source, derivation-first Authority, progressive settings, and answer-first Result.

responsibilities.statement: Keep every derivation inventory, selection, and output application-owned and mode-specific.

actors.contribution: Preserve existing typed control and result contracts while presentation changes.

responsibilities.statement: Prove surface order, disclosure, unchanged Linear/Diagram contracts, and live behavior across all derivation modes.

actors.contribution: Add focused presentation assertions and run live browser proof.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the target, board, shared action, and alignment evidence current.

actors.contribution: Record scope, verification, and closure without treating this as a lesson handoff.

retirements.removalEvidence: The Authority grid now assigns Derivation to its first named area and Logic to the second; live geometry places the Direct/Causative/Applicative tabs above every VNC decision.

Existing typed VNC nodes are retained with their IDs and listeners, then organized into a primary decision stage plus native Clause and Sentence disclosures. Direct opens Clause by default; derived modes collapse ordinary settings after source authorization.
The selected form and unchanged Linear/Diagram rendering now precede the authority receipt, followed by the application-owned Canvas/Andrews route and proof actions.
The typed source readout remains machine-owned but uses a wrapping inline compact-reading presentation; live proof measures it as one compact 56-pixel block for the current four facts.

evidence.result: 383/383 passed, including the complete #1/#2/#3 presentation contract and unchanged Linear/Diagram format assertions

Entered huāqui; Source readout rendered as a compact flex surface; Derivation preceded Logic; Clause was open and Sentence closed; selected Nihuāc. and its Linear/Diagram rendering preceded the authority receipt.

Causative exposed its primary generated-formation, source-voice, embedded-subject, and later-target-voice decisions with ordinary settings collapsed; selecting Type 1 authorized Nichuātz. before the authority receipt and Canvas/Andrews route.

Applicative exposed Generated formation, Imported object, and Later target voice in the primary stage with ordinary settings collapsed; selecting Type 1 authorized Nimitzhuāquih. before the authority receipt and Canvas/Andrews route.
Linear retained its continuous specific formula and own Specific/General switch. Diagram retained its independent switch and Subject plus Core/Tense grouped by the Predicate brace and label.
ALIGNED with zero delta for renderer construction, optional dependencies, unregistered contracts, browser scripts, and tracked reports
